description: Ghost process hollowing using NtCreateProcess without a section object. XOR-encrypted payload (key: 'Gh0stPr0c3ssH0ll0w!', 18 bytes). Creates an empty process via NtCreateProcess, manually maps a PE payload using NtAllocateVirtualMemory + NtWriteVirtualMemory, sets thread context entry point via SetThreadContext, and executes via NtCreateThreadEx. Includes NtResumeThread and RtlCreateProcessParameters for process initialization. Anti-debugging via NtQueryInformationProcess checking both ProcessDebugPort and ProcessDebugFlags. Synthetic/safe — uses a harmless 64-byte payload.
